raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juos/ kas juhs preezatees
aahr, weenu neezigu Leetu/ kas
uhs fakkat: Neggi mehs eſſim
aur muhfu Stiprumu preeksch
ewim Warru dabbuifschi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo reds/ Es wiꞥſelschu
rett jums no ta Israëka Nam-
na/ fakka tas KUNGS/ tas
Deews Zebaot/ weenu Tautu/
n ta nospaidihs juhs no tahs
Weetas/ fur uhs Ahmatu eet/
ihds tat Tukſnetes Uppei.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "As Klings KUNGS
futte man tchahdu Leetu
redſeht/ un raugi/ weens
taifija Siffenus eekſch Eetahku-
ma/ kad Attals uſgahje/ un re-
dsi/ tas Attals btja pehz ta Keh-
nina Ptauschanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee to Sahli Sem-
mes Wirſu wiſnotak gribbeja
apriht/ tad faſztiju es: Ak
Klings KUNGS! peedohd jel-
le/ ka warrehs Jehlabs pastah-
weht? Jo wiꞥſch irr mas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad bija tas tam KUN-
GAM schehl/ ir tas ne notiks/
fazzija tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atkat likke tas Klings
KUNGS man tchahdu Leetu
redſeht/ un redſi/ tas Klings
KUNGS iſtauze/ un gribbeja
ar Ugguni fohtiht/ ir tas jaw
norihje weenu leelu Dſikumu/
un aprihje arridsan weenu Sem-
mres Gabbalu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faſztiju es: Ak Klings
KUNGS! mittejeeß jelle/ ka
warrehs Jehlabs pastahweht?
jo wiꞥſch irr mas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad bija tas tam KUN-
GAM schehl/ ir tas ne notiks/
fazzija tas Klings KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atkat likke wiꞥſch man
tchahdu Leetu redſeht/ un raugi/
tas Klings stahweja us weenu
Muhri/ kas pehz Mehra-Auklt
bija darrihts/ un weens Mehra-
Auklis bija winna Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS faſztija
uhs man: Ko tu redsi Amos?
Tad faſztiju es: Weenu Mehra-
Aukli: Tad faſztija tas Klings:
Reds/ Es wilſchu weenu Meh-
ra-Aukli zaur Widdu manneem
Israëka Laudim/ un wiꞥſus
wairß ne taudſechu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Jhsaaka Augſtumi
taps poſtiti/ un Israëta fweh-
tas Weetas taps nopohſtitas /
un es zelſchohs prett Jerobeama
Namimu ar Sobbiha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhtiju Amazijus tas
Preesteris no Beteles/ uhs Je-
robeamu to Israëta Kehnizu/
un faſztija: Amos darra weenu
Ddd 2 Dumpi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
